user.title: Bridge Bank
user.description:
Enter the URL of your Bridge Bank instance. If running as a Home Assistant add-on, use http://localhost:3000. For standalone Docker, use the container's address (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:3002).

This integration provides sync status sensors and redirects OAuth callbacks from your Nabu Casa URL to Bridge Bank.

hassio_confirm.title: Bridge Bank (Add-on detected)
hassio_confirm.description:
The Bridge Bank add-on was detected. The integration will connect to it automatically at {addon_url}.

This provides sync status sensors and an OAuth callback endpoint.

error.invalid_url: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
